class.name: GDKProfile
class.brief_description: Xbox Services profile service accessed via GDK.profile.
class.description: Wraps Xbox Services profile lookup APIs. Methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult].

method.name: get_profile_async
method.description: Queries one Xbox profile. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; on success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [GDKUserProfile].

method.name: get_profiles_async
method.description: Queries Xbox profiles for the supplied XUID strings. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is an [Array] of [GDKUserProfile] objects.

method.name: get_profiles_for_social_group_async
method.description: Queries Xbox profiles for a social group such as [code]People[/code] or [code]Favorites[/code]. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is an [Array] of [GDKUserProfile] objects.
